title: NMiAI Grocery Bot — game_state message
description: Server-to-client message sent every round containing full game state.

max_rounds.description: Maximum number of rounds in the game

width.description: Grid width in cells. Easy=12, Medium=16, Hard=22, Expert=28

height.description: Grid height in cells. Easy=10, Medium=12, Hard=14, Expert=18

walls.description: Array of [x, y] coordinates for all impassable cells (border + interior walls + shelf cells). Items position on these wall cells.

id.description: Bot ID. Actions resolve in bot ID order (0 first).

position.description: [x, y] current position on the grid

inventory.description: Item type names currently held by this bot (max 3)

bots.description: Array of bot states. Easy=1 bot, Medium=3, Hard=5, Expert=10.

position.description: [x, y] position on a shelf wall cell. NOT walkable — bot must be adjacent to pick up.

items.description: All items currently on shelves (not yet picked up)

items_required.description: Item type names required for this order. May contain duplicates.

items_delivered.description: Item type names already delivered for this order

complete.description: Whether all required items have been delivered

status.description: 'active' = can deliver to; 'preview' = next order (visible, can pre-pick items but not deliver)

orders.description: Visible orders. Always contains active + preview (when available).

drop_off.description: [x, y] position of the drop-off cell. Walkable. Bot must stand here to drop_off.

score.description: Current score. +1 per item delivered, +5 bonus per order completed.

active_order_index.description: Index of the active order in the full order list

total_orders.description: Total number of orders in the game (Easy: 50)
